rationale: Exp 450 and 456 both show max_depth=7 achieving Brier=0.185762, which is the best result in recent history (Δ=-0.000251). This consistently outperforms the current baseline and nearby values (depth=8 at 0.185830, depth=9 at 0.186023). Depth=7 appears to be the sweet spot for generalization on 2023+ test data.
